title.en: After Ye Tian came out of Panshan, he sighed se...

content.en:
"It's a pity that the meeting period is a little short!"

After Ye Tian came out of Panshan, he sighed secretly.

However, he found that the number of Ninefold Ancestors who had been brought out from Panshan was much less.

After returning to the Nine-Fold Building, after inquiring and investigating, Ye Tian found that this time the Nine-Story Building had fallen a total of more than twenty Ninefold Ancestors.

You must know that the number of Ninefold Origin Ancestors is already scarce, let alone the fall of more than twenty!

Moreover, there was also a second-tier Ninefold Ancestor who had fallen.

However, the loss of the Nine-Fold Building was not the greatest, and the Secret Realm was even more unlucky to fall a Supreme Ninefold Ancestor.

Hearing this news, Ye Tian was really shocked.

It's incredible that a Supreme Ninefold Ancestor has fallen!

However, the Primordial Antiquities also fell by two to the Enhancement Level, and the Forbidden Zone was also cut off by one Enhancement Level.

How these Xeons fell, the news has not come out.

But they definitely encountered extremely terrifying supreme fortified creatures, and maybe even a large number, and then they fell.

After all, there are quite a few supreme enhancements in the Panshan Territory, and once they are besieged, it is normal for them to fall.

It's like Ye Tian himself, if he didn't have the energy to copy the bodies of other creatures, so that he could blend into one race after another, otherwise even if he had the strength to the strength of the strengthening level, if he dared to be so arrogant, he wouldn't be able to live!

Since the end of the meeting period, both the five top powers of the Silent Black Sea and the supreme reinforcement level that have cut off the forbidden area have all been closed one by one.

Obviously, these Xeons have all gained great benefits, and they are all using the benefits obtained during the intersection period to improve their strength.

And Ye Tian also began to practice in retreat.

He has obtained a huge amount of resources this time, among which there are many treasures that improve the level of life and immeasurable will, and some treasures can also increase his comprehension, and he can comprehend the immeasurable path faster.

In addition, he copied many immeasurable ancestral endowments, so it was easier to comprehend the immeasurable path.

With his current talent potential, it is naturally not difficult to comprehend the Immeasurable Dao to the Dacheng realm.

Time flies, and trillions of primordial era years have passed in the blink of an eye.

Airplanes!!!

In the immeasurable time and space, Ye Tian's body exuded the aura of a great cheng-level immeasurable dao, but it was quickly restrained by him.

"Immeasurable Dao, I have finally been promoted to the realm of Dacheng!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

Subsequently, he spent some more time perfecting his Infinite Dao control skills to the Minor Perfection level.

With these small consummation-level immeasurable dao control techniques, his strength skyrocketed, and he officially stepped into the first echelon of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, but he was not weak in this first echelon.

With his current strength, even if he is not as good as a Ninefold Origin Ancestor like the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor, the gap should not be large.

And.

Ye Tian's immeasurable will is still improving, and it has now been raised to 108 scales, and there are still many resources in his hands, which are enough to raise his immeasurable will to 120 scales.

When the time comes, his strength will have to be improved.

Not only that, but his life level also showed signs of advancing to 108.

If he could be raised to the 108th life level, his life level would only be a thin line away from the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor.

"Before I become the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor, I still have a lot of room for improvement in my strength!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Ever since Ye Tian's Infinite Dao had achieved great success, Infinite Time and Space had not been of much help to him.

Maybe the immeasurable time and space at the peak of the past will still help, but now the immeasurable time and space are about to be unable to support it, so naturally there is no way for him to quickly comprehend the immeasurable path.

If he wants to attain the enlightenment of the Immeasurable Path to the consummation realm, it is too difficult and too difficult!

Like the nine Supreme Ninefold Ancestors in the Nine-Fold Building, only one of them had raised the Immeasurable Dao to the extreme realm, and the others were all in the consummation realm.

One can imagine how difficult it is to improve the immeasurable path, and they have used countless years of time to slowly boil it up to the state of perfection.

It is also Ye Tian who has a large number of Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowments and multiple Infinite Ancestral Endowments, which can only raise the Infinite Dao to the Dacheng realm in such a short period of time.

However, even if his comprehension speed was countless times faster than that of the other Ninefold Ancestors, it would only shorten the time by many times, and it was impossible to raise the Immeasurable Dao to the Dacheng realm overnight.

"It would be nice if you could enter other precious land habits that will help you comprehend the immeasurable path!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

At this time, he thought of cutting off the forbidden area.

Will there be such a place in the Forbidden Zone?

It's just that the creatures who cut off the forbidden area don't understand the immeasurable path, they follow the path of primordial antiquities.

Cut off the exclusion zone.

Because those who are at the heightened level are in retreat, they are not disturbed by anything.

Therefore, the cutting off of the forbidden area was controlled by those Nine Primordial Ancestors.

Ye Tian's strength itself is very strong, and his talent is high, so he has a very high status in the Soul Splitting Red Beast Clan, and he uses the Soul Splitting Red Beast Clan to explore the treasure land that can comprehend the Immeasurable Dao.

Of course, he did not explicitly state that he was looking for a treasure place to comprehend the immeasurable path, but said that he was contemplating a secret technique and needed a suitable treasure land.

In this way, he had to find places like the Immeasurable Plane.

In addition, he occasionally searched for it himself, stepped into the territory of other races, or copied the bodies of other races to sneak in, and finally found a place after many investigations.

"Nothing Mountains!"

This is the territory of jellyfish.

However, now that the jellyfish are in retreat, and the jellyfish have no subordinates and clansmen, there is no mountain without guards.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Immortal Mountain.

As soon as he entered the Immortal Mountain, he immediately discovered the problem of the Immortal Mountain.

"There is a problem with the Immortal Mountain, there is a force here that will continue to erode the immeasurable will and will make people crazy!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He suspected that the reason why the jellyfish went crazy had something to do with the Immortal Mountain.

Of course, the jellyfish is mainly due to racial issues, and the absence of the mountain is not fundamental.

But if you come here to practice at the general level, you will definitely go crazy.

Therefore, even if many Ninefold Origin Ancestors knew that the Immortal Mountain was a good treasure land and asked them to come here to practice, they would not come.

"For me, the problem of not having a mountain is not a problem at all. I'm here to comprehend the Immeasurable Path, if something goes wrong with the body or the immeasurable will, it's just a big deal to directly annihilate and copy the body!"

So, Ye Tian let a copy body comprehend the immeasurable path here.

Anyway, no avatar-level will come here, and the jellyfish are in retreat, so even if they get out, it is unlikely that they will enter the Immortal Mountain.

In the following years, Ye Tian comprehended the Immeasurable Dao in the Immortal Mountain.

As soon as he attained enlightenment, he found that the help of the Immortal Mountain to the enlightenment of the Immeasurable Path was far greater than that of the Immeasurable Time and Space.

If he cultivated in the Immortal Mountain, his Infinite Dao ascension speed would definitely be very fast!
